# TB Relo — Tampa Bay Relocation Guide
# https://tbrelo.com

## About
TB Relo is the most comprehensive relocation guide for the Tampa Bay, Florida metro area. It covers all 8 counties (Hillsborough, Pinellas, Pasco, Polk, Manatee, Sarasota, Hernando, and Citrus), 100+ cities, cost of living, schools, neighborhoods, and practical moving logistics.

## Author
Barrett Henry
Broker Associate, REMAX Collective
The NOW Team
Email: barrett@nowtb.com
Phone: (813) 733-7907
Website: https://nowtb.com
License: Florida Real Estate Broker #3313308
Designations: e-PRO, MRP, SRS
